rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion By Third Parties To Quash The Trial Subpoena To Mark Clarke And To Order Plaintiff To Provide Reasonable Notice Of Appearance At Trial To Non-Party Witnesses
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for MAR. 27 2020 line 4. EDISON MISSION GROUP, INC. and MARK CLARKE's Motion By Third Parties To Quash The Trial Subpoena To Mark Clarke And To Order Plaintiff To Provide Reasonable Notice Of Appearance At Trial To Non-Party Witnesses continued to May 22, 2020. Trial is continued to June 8, 2020. If parties stipulate to a different hearing/trial date after May 22, 2020/June 8, 2020 (respectively), parties may notify the Court at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org by 8:00 a.m. on March 27, 2020. No appearance required. Please be advised that this e-mail address is not regularly monitored and no other communications with the Court are allowed via this e-mail.= (501/CFH)
